nasb.text: You shall cook and eat it in the place which the Lord your God chooses. In the morning you are to return to your tents.

esv.text: And you shall cook it and eat it at the place that the Lord your God will choose. And in the morning you shall turn and go to your tents.

cnv.text: 你要在耶和華你的　神選擇的地方，把祭肉煮了吃；到了早晨，你才可以回到家裡去。

ccb.text: 你们要在那里煮祭肉吃，第二天早晨可以返回自己的帐篷。
